title: Status Report Example
subtitle: Summarize project status, changes, and next actions.

sections.heading: Status Report in use
sections.body: This report summarizes the state of a fictional gallery refresh so the template demonstrates real status mechanics instead of generic validation cards.

cards.title: Scope
cards.body: 33 template examples regenerated with content-specific sections.

cards.title: Validation
cards.body: Static checks pass locally; browser checks focus on clickability and light surfaces.

cards.title: Risk
cards.body: Future template additions need matching example content and a guard test.

sections.heading: Next actions
items: Review the five representative outputs visually.
Keep placeholder-content assertions in the test suite.
Use the gallery as a reference when adding a new template.
